title: Methonica simplex

taxonomy: Methonica simplex is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Methonica. This plant is native to the Mediterranean region, specifically found in countries such as Greece and Turkey. Methonica simplex is a type of succulent, which means it has adapted to store water in its leaves to survive in arid environments. The classification of Methonica simplex is still being studied, and more research is needed to fully understand its taxonomic position.
uses: Unfortunately, I do not know the medicinal uses of Methonica simplex.
